---
title: "Ken Nyholm"
---

Welcome to my website!

Here you can find papers, MATLAB and Julia code related to my work on yield curve modelling, fixed income markets, and asset allocation.

I work at the European Central Bank. Views expressed on this site are my own and do not represent the ECB.

I have recently started programming in [Julia](https://julialang.org) and will post code and examples as I generate them.

### Textbook

I am currently writing [*A Practitioner's Guide to Financial Market Analysis*](/textbook/index.html), covering yield curve modelling, DB pension funds, and related topics.

### Links

Find me on [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=IexGlR8AAAAJ), [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Ken-Nyholm), and the [ECB author page](https://www.ecb.europa.eu/pub/research/authors/profiles/ken-nyholm.en.html).
